gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor smiles widely, opens arms wide, and steps toward the class while inviting them to explore adding numbers.
a person raises one hand and extends fingers to show five, leaning slightly forward to engage the learners.
a tutor holds five colorful blocks up with both hands, turning slightly to face the class while encouraging them to count.
a person places five more blocks beside the first set, stepping back with a playful gesture to challenge the class.
a tutor moves around the room, encouraging students to look for five objects and enthusiastically pointing to different areas.
a person kneels down slightly, claps hands together, and smiles while guiding the learners to count their objects aloud.
a tutor jumps lightly with joy, raises both arms high, and beams at the class while celebrating their success in adding.
a person gestures with hands in a playful manner, swaying side to side while expressing that adding is fun and easy.
